subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Upon thee be the peace of God, the Single, the One! We bear witness that thou hast attained unto that which was inscribed by the Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد علیک سلام الله الفرد الاحد نشهد انک فزت بما کان مرقوما من القلم
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
